G3J3KMaZ3eYfE5G6ynOomQ==.description: Title for the Privacy Policy page

pRYnfVrNgGCBMt02uRVE4w==.description: Heading for Introduction section in Privacy Policy page

5OlNL5ksePBWiMiaeLsbPA==.description: Introduction text for Privacy Policy page

translations.translation: We’re glad you’re interested in our app. Protecting your privacy is very important to us. Below, we’ll explain how we handle your data in detail.

D/JTNgOmfI+mhG2nz9wH7A==.description: Heading for Data Collection section in Privacy Policy page

bPxgK6IWc6wzjeg32wbCBw==.description: Text for Data Collection section in Privacy Policy page

translations.translation: By default, our app does not collect or store any personal data unless you choose to provide it when using specific features (for example, creating an account or entering activity data). We use this data only to provide the app’s functionalities.

roVDyV5E4CYfKkWn9EkZLQ==.description: Heading for Data Sharing section in Privacy Policy page

translations.translation: Disclosure of Data to Third Parties

HmNptuyZzeg/gZQ6VGrulQ==.description: Text for Data Sharing section in Privacy Policy page

translations.translation: Your personal data will never be shared with third parties unless we’re legally required to do so, or you’ve given us your explicit prior consent.

WceRkBEowo91SuD0yS1kYA==.description: Heading for Cookies/Similar Technologies section in Privacy Policy page

translations.translation: Use of Cookies or Similar Technologies

q60InR3o0LA/40RsLCAVbQ==.description: Text for Cookies/Similar Technologies section in Privacy Policy page

translations.translation: Our app may use local storage technologies (similar to cookies) to remember your preferences or app state. These are used only for the app’s functionality and are never used for tracking.

CWg0wZ7QFRdc3Ilc0sdDhg==.description: Heading for Your Rights section in Privacy Policy page

SkxIAjKoE7A6Ror6Vs1uvA==.description: Text for Your Rights section in Privacy Policy page

translations.translation: You have the right to access your personal data stored with us—including where it came from, who received it, and why it’s processed—free of charge at any time. You also have the right to request corrections, blocking, or deletion of this data. If you have any questions or requests regarding your personal data, feel free to contact us anytime at the address listed in the imprint.

LARUBSb09iTySFwjv6knlg==.description: Heading for Changes to Privacy Policy section in Privacy Policy page

R+60DcjqXx/1f+j8RU16/w==.description: Text for Changes to Privacy Policy section in Privacy Policy page

translations.translation: We may update this privacy policy from time to time so it always meets current legal requirements or reflects changes to our services, such as new features. The updated privacy policy will apply the next time you use the app.

VS1bBx+rg1Cmei1ABTrPXQ==.description: Heading for Contact for Privacy Questions section in Privacy Policy page

4GqeeZYW5JoHoDWMUmm41A==.description: Text for Contact for Privacy Questions section in Privacy Policy page

translations.translation: If you have any questions about data protection, please send us an email or reach out directly to the responsible person listed in the imprint.

AukHwCaT1QvaYWcbPjPQxA==.description: Explanation of what a growth percentile means

translations.translation: A percentile shows how your child's measurement compares to other children of the same age and sex. For example, P50 means your child is in the middle: 50% of children are smaller and 50% are larger. P95 means your child is larger than 95% of children the same age.
